title: Undertale Combat
description: Combat sounds, menu elements, and particles from the game Undertale
body:
Please spread the resource pack🙏, I'll be pleased🌠, maybe I'll even buy ice cream with the money from the ads 🍦. Thanks in advance.❤️

# ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a61da32093983eac3541533ba04a7a4ae40b9a2d.png)

Adds combat sounds, particles, and GUI elements from the game UNDERTALE. Custom sounds for sword, mob damage, player damage, bow, crossbow, trident, mace, food, totem, ui and others.

## Sound demo:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OLYhSO9bCwU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
